rationale: Both ensures (for r1/post1 and r2/post2) share the same shape but use disjoint triggers per post-state; we re-assert each forall under both post-states so z3 instantiates them together, then do per-accessor pointwise reasoning (with case splits on target_proc_ptr / target_va / src_pa) and close with Map/Set extensionality (`=~=`) to force the two post-states to agree on every spec-accessor view.
